name: say-it-loud
description: Drop audio clips in a folder and play them in a small floating window. A tiny CLI other apps and AI agents can call to get the folder and play a sound.

scripts.package: npm run build && electron-packager . "Say It Loud" --platform=darwin --arch=arm64 --out=build --overwrite --app-bundle-id=com.sayitloud.app --ignore="/src" --ignore="/build"
